name: E-Waste Recycling
metaTitle: E-Waste Recycling Kochi | KSPCB Authorised | Free Pickup
metaDesc: Certified e-waste recycling in Kochi, Kerala. Free doorstep pickup, KSPCB authorised, zero landfill. Book your pickup in 60 seconds.
h1: E-Waste Recycling in Kochi — Certified, Free & Responsible
description: Complete guide to responsible electronic waste disposal in Kochi. From laptops to servers, we recycle everything safely.
intro: Kerala generates over 60,000 tonnes of electronic waste annually — and less than 5% is properly recycled. Every old laptop, phone, television, and UPS battery that enters the informal scrap trade risks toxic leaching of lead, mercury, and cadmium into Kerala's rivers and groundwater. EWaste Kochi is the state's only KSPCB-authorised recycler offering completely free doorstep pickup for bulk e-waste across the Ernakulam district and surrounding areas.

name: IT Asset Disposition
metaTitle: ITAD Services Kochi | IT Asset Disposition | Certified & Auditable
metaDesc: Professional IT Asset Disposition in Kochi. NIST 800-88 data destruction, chain-of-custody, Certificate of Destruction for RBI and ISO audits.
h1: IT Asset Disposition (ITAD) in Kochi — Secure, Certified & Audit-Ready
description: End-to-end ITAD for Kochi enterprises. Asset tagging, certified data destruction, remarketing, and full chain-of-custody documentation.
intro: When your company retires IT hardware, the stakes are higher than most IT managers realise. A single unwiped hard drive recovered from a landfill or informal scrap dealer provided the basis for some of India's most damaging corporate data breaches. EWaste Kochi's ITAD programme follows a strict chain-of-custody from your premises to our processing facility, covering every asset with NIST 800-88 certified data sanitisation and audit-ready documentation.

name: Responsible Recycling
metaTitle: Responsible Electronics Recycling Kerala | Zero Landfill | KSPCB
metaDesc: Responsible electronics recycling across Kerala. Zero landfill commitment, KSPCB authorised, hazardous material safe handling. Free bulk pickup.
h1: Responsible Electronics Recycling in Kerala — Zero Landfill, 100% Certified
description: Deep guide to responsible electronics recycling — what happens to your e-waste, how materials are recovered, and why certification matters.
intro: Electronic recycling is not simply breaking old devices apart. It is a complex, multi-stage process requiring specialised equipment for hazardous material containment, precious metal recovery, and certified destruction of data-bearing components. At our Thrippunithura facility, every item passes through a documented processing chain before any material is refined or recovered.

name: E-Waste Marketplace
metaTitle: Buy Refurbished Electronics Kochi | Laptops, Desktops | Certified Pre-Owned
metaDesc: Buy certified refurbished laptops, desktops, and phones in Kochi. From our ITAD programme — data wiped, tested, warranted. 40–70% below retail.
h1: Certified Refurbished Electronics Marketplace — Kochi's Trusted Pre-Owned Store
description: Buy and sell certified pre-owned electronics. All devices data-wiped, hardware-tested, and sold with a 6-month warranty.
intro: Every device in our marketplace comes directly from our corporate ITAD programme — decommissioned assets from Infopark companies, banks, and hospitals that have been professionally data-wiped to NIST 800-88 standards, hardware-tested, and graded. You get business-class reliability at a fraction of the retail price, with full confidence that no prior data exists on the device.

name: Service Locations
metaTitle: E-Waste Pickup Locations Kochi | All Areas of Ernakulam | Free Collection
metaDesc: E-waste pickup across all Kochi locations: Kakkanad, Infopark, Edappally, Vyttila, Aluva, Fort Kochi, Marine Drive, MG Road and 50+ areas.
h1: E-Waste Pickup Across All Kochi Locations — Free Doorstep Collection
description: Complete coverage of all Kochi and Ernakulam locations. Find your area and book a free e-waste pickup in minutes.
intro: From the IT corridor of Infopark and Smart City to the heritage lanes of Fort Kochi and the residential colonies of Vyttila — EWaste Kochi covers the entire Ernakulam district with free doorstep e-waste collection. Our routing algorithm prioritises same-day pickup for corporate clients and next-day service for residential bookings in all areas.

name: Our Services
metaTitle: E-Waste & ITAD Services Kochi | Certificate of Destruction | Full List
metaDesc: Complete e-waste and ITAD services in Kochi: data destruction, hard drive shredding, laptop buyback, battery recycling, compliance reporting.
h1: Complete E-Waste & ITAD Services in Kochi — Certified for Every Need
description: Full menu of e-waste and ITAD services. From a single laptop to a full data centre decommission — we have the service you need.
intro: Whether you are a homeowner clearing an old laptop, a startup decommissioning 20 employees' devices, or an enterprise closing a data centre, EWaste Kochi has a certified, documented service tailored to your volume, compliance level, and timeline. Every service includes KSPCB-compliant documentation and a satisfaction guarantee.

name: About EWaste Kochi
metaTitle: About EWaste Kochi | KSPCB Certified Recycler | Our Mission & Team
metaDesc: About EWaste Kochi — Kerala's certified e-waste recycler. Our KSPCB authorisation, facility, team, certifications, and sustainability mission.
h1: About EWaste Kochi — Kerala's Most Trusted Certified E-Waste Recycler
description: Learn about EWaste Kochi — our certifications, facility, team, mission, and commitment to zero-landfill responsible recycling in Kerala.
intro: EWaste Kochi was founded on a simple belief: that responsible e-waste management should be accessible to everyone in Kerala — from families disposing of an old television to corporations decommissioning entire server farms. Our Thrippunithura facility operates under full KSPCB authorisation, and every process we run is designed to maximise material recovery while minimising environmental harm.

name: E-Waste Knowledge Hub
metaTitle: E-Waste Blog Kerala | News, Guides & Compliance Updates | EWaste Kochi
metaDesc: E-waste news, compliance guides, recycling tips, and ITAD best practices for Kerala businesses. Updated weekly by EWaste Kochi experts.
h1: E-Waste Knowledge Hub — News, Guides & Expert Insights for Kerala
description: Expert articles on e-waste recycling, ITAD best practices, compliance updates, and sustainability guides for Kerala businesses and households.
intro: The e-waste landscape in India is changing rapidly — the E-Waste Rules 2022 introduced sweeping changes to producer obligations, the DPDP Act 2023 created new data destruction mandates, and the EPR framework is being progressively enforced. Our knowledge hub brings you practical guidance from our team of ITAD specialists and compliance experts.

metaDesc: Contact EWaste Kochi for a free e-waste pickup quote. WhatsApp, call, or fill our form. Same-day response for corporate inquiries.
h1: Contact EWaste Kochi — Get Your Free Quote in 60 Seconds
description: Get in touch with EWaste Kochi for free quotes, pickup scheduling, ITAD consultations, or compliance queries.
intro: Getting started with certified e-waste recycling is easier than you think. Share your device list and location — and we will give you a firm pickup slot within the hour for corporate clients. WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach us, but we also respond to email within 2 business hours.

name: Compliance Documentation Hub
metaTitle: E-Waste Compliance Docs Kerala | EPR, DPDP Act, KSPCB Guides
metaDesc: Complete compliance documentation for Kerala e-waste: E-Waste Rules 2022, DPDP Act 2023, KSPCB authorisation, EPR filing, RBI/SEBI guidelines.
h1: E-Waste Compliance Documentation Hub — Kerala's Complete Reference
description: Complete reference for e-waste compliance in Kerala. E-Waste Rules 2022, DPDP Act 2023, EPR filing, KSPCB authorisation, and audit documentation guides.
intro: India's e-waste regulatory framework has expanded significantly since 2022. Between the E-Waste Management Rules 2022, the DPDP Act 2023, the EPR portal requirements, and sector-specific guidelines from RBI, SEBI, and NABARD — compliance is now a multi-dimensional challenge for Kerala businesses. This hub provides practitioner-level guides for every compliance scenario.
